programme.title: The Night That Didnt End
programme.desc: Tara forsvant kort tid etter at familien flyttet til Florida. Moren, søsteren og stefaren forteller om dagen da livene deres endret seg for alltid.

programme.title: Forbrytelsene som rystet USA
programme.desc: Sommeren 2019 forsvinner en mor fra hjemmet sitt i Kansas. Ingen av ledetrådene fører noe sted, til tross for at ektemannen stadig endrer forklaring.

programme.title: The Curious Case Of...
programme.desc: Gjennom flere år og i flere delstater skaper en kvinne nye identiteter, helsedrama og kriser som trekker hele lokalsamfunn inn i bedrageriet hennes.

programme.title: Cabin In The Woods
programme.desc: En kosmetologstudent blir savnet i Dubuque i Iowa. Etterforskerne lurer på om forsvinningen har tilknytning til et annet drap.

programme.title: Det perfekte mord
programme.desc: Et par blir skutt i sitt nye hjem, men ektemannen Dan Montecalvo overlever. Etterforskningen avslører en kalkulert drapsmann som nesten slapp unna med det perfekte mord.

programme.title: Det perfekte mord
programme.desc: Eiendomsutvikleren Jana Koklich forsvinner og politiet mistenker at jobben satte henne i fare, helt til en lokal prest kommer med en sjokkerende bekjennelse.

programme.title: Murder In The Heartland
programme.desc: En gårdsarbeider i Rapelje i Montana finner sin medarbeider, Daniel Lavigne, drept. I en by med kun 110 mennesker, er innbyggerne redde for at gjerningspersonen skal slå til igjen. Alle de ansatte på grisefarmen blir mistenkte i politiets etterforskning.

programme.title: Murder In The Heartland
programme.desc: Joy Dishneau eier en liten bedrift i Ozarks, men når hun blir funnet drept i sin egen butikk, blir alle de ansatte mistenkte.

programme.title: A Body in the Basement
programme.desc: Et likfunn i en kjeller i California gjenåpner et flere tiår gammelt mysterium. Politiet oppdager at det er en tenåring som forsvant i 1984.

programme.title: A Body in the Basement
programme.desc: Under en oppussing blir det funnet et skjelett i en kjeller i Pennsylvania. Politiet avdekker en gammel savnetsak og en uhyggelig familiehemmelighet.

programme.title: Cabin In The Woods
programme.desc: En kosmetologstudent blir savnet i Dubuque i Iowa. Etterforskerne lurer på om forsvinningen har tilknytning til et annet drap.

programme.title: Man With A Van
programme.desc: Meredith Emerson starter det nye året med en tur til Blood Mountain i Georgia sammen med hunden. Da hun forsvinner og hunden dukker opp ti mil unna, starter en stor leteaksjon.

programme.title: Betrayed
programme.desc: Da en kirkesekretær blir savnet, og deretter funnet død, undersøker politiet om hun har blitt drept av en ny og sjalu internett-date eller av noen innen hennes egen familie.

programme.title: Betrayed
programme.desc: Forsvinningen til Dena Raley-McCluskey druknet i medieoppstyret rundt mer oppsiktsvekkende drap, inntil en politimann som kjedet seg snublet over den flere år gamle saken.

programme.title: Death By Fame
programme.desc: En ung skuespiller får sitt store gjennombrudd. Når hun blir brutalt drept, tråler politiet timevis med videoopptak for å ta morderen på fersken.

programme.title: The Crimes That Changed Us
programme.desc: En mor med en sterk fascinasjon for ekstreme religiøse ideer og en skjult barselspsykose, tror at djevelen sender henne meldinger, noe som leder henne til å drukne sine fem barn.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love
programme.desc: En dekorert marinesoldat må takle krig i hjemmet når han faller for en gift kvinne. Mistanker og sjalusi preger affæren, og ødelegger både familiene og livene deres.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love
programme.desc: En tenåring som ikke får lov å date forelsker seg i en eldre elev på skolen. De tar ekstreme grep for å være sammen, og det ender med en katastrofe.

programme.title: Love Kills
programme.desc: Skjebnen fører Lori og Mike sammen etter hans fengselsstraff. Men når han ikke finner arbeid, tyr han til forbrytelser igjen, og trekker Lori med seg.

programme.title: Seduced To Slay
programme.desc: En barndomsvenn flytter inn hos en mann og familien hans, og en ondsinnet forførelse ender med kaldblodig drap i Buford i Georgia.

programme.title: Murder Calls
programme.desc: I denne serien ser vi hvordan nødsamtalene til 911 til slutt fører etterforskerne til sannheten, etter at de har tolket informasjonen som blir rapportert inn om ulike lovbrudd.

programme.title: Der ondskapen bor
programme.desc: Et par tar til seg et trøblete fosterbarn og havner raskt i en forskrudd situasjon som ender med et brutalt drap.

programme.title: Twisted Sisters
programme.desc: Når Diane Harts ektemann slutter å gi henne penger, ber hun søsteren om hjelp. De legger en dødelig plan for å få tak i pengene de mener hun fortjener.

programme.title: The Curious Case Of...
programme.desc: Gjennom flere år og i flere delstater skaper en kvinne nye identiteter, helsedrama og kriser som trekker hele lokalsamfunn inn i bedrageriet hennes.

programme.desc: En panisk student ringer nødnummeret for å fortelle at hun har skutt kjæresten sin i selvforsvar. Politiet oppdager raskt at de har å gjøre med en hjerteløs psykopat.

programme.title: Der ondskapen bor

programme.title: Seduced To Slay
programme.desc: En barndomsvenn flytter inn hos en mann og familien hans, og en ondsinnet forførelse ender med kaldblodig drap i Buford i Georgia.

programme.title: Forbrytelsene som rystet USA
programme.desc: Rett før Thanksgiving i Oklahoma City blir et ektepar overfalt i hjemmet, og mannen blir drept. Med få spor, må politiet bruke ballistikk, rettsmedisin og nabosladder for å løse det kaldblodige drapet.

programme.title: Forbrytelsene som rystet USA
programme.desc: Det kristne parets helgetur tar en tragisk vending når de blir funnet drept på en strand i det nordlige California. Sataniske bilder blir funnet i nærheten og leder den lokale Sheriffen på jakt etter en gjerningsperson, som har vært flink til å skjule sine spor.

programme.title: True Crime with Aphrodite Jones
programme.desc: Aphrodite ble opprørt da Casey ble frikjent for drapet på sin datter, spesielt etter at hun fortalte noen merkelige løgner. Men hva så juryen som mange andre ikke gjorde?

programme.title: True Crime with Aphrodite Jones
programme.desc: Når en lege kommer hjem på Valentinsdagen for å overraske sin kone, finner han henne død. Men som Aphrodite finner ut, så er ikke noe i denne saken slik det virker å være.

programme.title: Donald Trump: A Faking It Special
programme.sub-title: The Murder Of Grace Millane: A Faking It Special
programme.desc: En kroppsspråkanalytiker, en lingvistikkekspert og en rettspsykolog studerer den hovedmistenkte i drapet på den britiske ryggsekkturisten Grace Millane.

programme.title: Donald Trump: A Faking It Special
programme.sub-title: Ted Bundy: A Faking It Special
programme.desc: Kroppsspråkanalytiker dr. Cliff Lansley, lingvistikkekspert professor Dawn Archer og rettspsykolog Kerry Daynes forklarer hvordan seriemorderen Ted Bundy unnslapp loven ved å vri på fakta, skape forvirring og manipulere sannheten.

programme.title: Web of Lies
programme.desc: 36 år gamle Indle kurtiserer 18 år gamle Anastasia på nett. Hun reiser fra hjemmet i Kirgisistan for å gifte seg med ham i Seattle, men drømmen utvikler seg til et mareritt.

programme.title: Web of Lies
programme.desc: Megan, en 13 år gammel jente fra et lite sted, møter en 16 år gammel gutt på nettet og forelsker seg. Men romansen blir forferdelig når løgnene avsløres.

programme.title: Murder Calls
programme.desc: En kvinne ringer nødnummeret og sier hun har funnet sin sønn død i hans hjem. Først ser det ut som et ran som gikk galt, men så oppdager politiet av dette var personlig.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes
programme.desc: Etterforskning av ekte forbrytelser med videoer fra kroppskameraene til politibetjenter fra hele USA. Følg med på dramatikken som vil lede politiet til morderen.

programme.title: Reprisesendinger Fra 19:30-sendingen og utover
programme.desc: Reprisesendinger Fra 19:30-sendingen og utover.

programme.title: Orangutangenes jungelskole
programme.desc: Livet til ni måneder gamle Alejandra blir helt forandret etter en fryktelig ulykke i barnehagen. På skogsskolen nyter elevene undervisning ved bassenget, og Valentino beviser at han er mye mer enn bare klassens klovn.

programme.title: Monsunens øy
programme.desc: En menneskeskapt innsjø i Minneriya nasjonalpark hjelper den største konsentrasjonen av elefanter i Asia. Følg en ung hann som har nådd vendepunktet på vei til voksenlivet. I regnskogen er junglene fulle av et stort utvalg bisarre insektsarter.

programme.title: Tusker: Elefantenes brorskap
programme.desc: Fordyp deg i de intrikate livene til tuskers med Craig, Pascal og Esau, tre afrikanske hann-elefanter i alle livets stadier. Få et sjeldent innblikk i det subtile språket, kompleks samhandling og dype bånd hos verdens største pattedyr på land.

programme.title: Elefanthistorier
programme.desc: Følg eventyrene til tre elefanter i tre særegne habitater i Afrika. Sammen forteller de historien om hvordan disse emosjonelle og intelligente dyrene har utviklet seg gjennom millioner av år for å overleve på dette kontinentet.

programme.title: På dypt vann i Australia
programme.desc: Si farvel til tropene og bli med til det kjølige vannet på sørkysten. Bli kjent med majestetiske sandtigerhaier, sepiablekkspruter som kan skifte form, og enorme blåhvaler. Se pingviner og sjøløver leke, og finn ut hvorfor dette farvannet yrer av liv.

programme.title: Big Cat Country
programme.desc: I løpet av de siste ukene av tørketiden holder flokkene seg i nærheten av det eneste vannet som finnes i elven. Men i Luangwa er dette farlig – spesielt når lukten av en drept flodhest får Hollywood-flokken til å krysse elven.

programme.title: Big Cat Country
programme.desc: Hollywood-flokken med bare hunner har vært i eksil etter å ha blitt angrepet av de fire brødrene i Nomadene. Men lederen deres, Ava, bestemmer seg for å føre familien sørover til hjertet av territoriet deres for å konfrontere Nomadene.

programme.title: Vulkanske reiser
programme.desc: Den største turistattraksjonen på øya Hawaii er vulkanen Kilauea. Etter at kraterbunnen plutselig kollapset, tømte et enormt utbrudd vulkanen for lava, og Kilauea er nå rolig. Geologen Phillip Ong benytter sjansen til å utforske vulkanen nærmere.

programme.title: Big Cat Country
programme.desc: I løpet av de siste ukene av tørketiden holder flokkene seg i nærheten av det eneste vannet som finnes i elven. Men i Luangwa er dette farlig – spesielt når lukten av en drept flodhest får Hollywood-flokken til å krysse elven.

programme.title: Big Cat Country
programme.desc: Hollywood-flokken med bare hunner har vært i eksil etter å ha blitt angrepet av de fire brødrene i Nomadene. Men lederen deres, Ava, bestemmer seg for å føre familien sørover til hjertet av territoriet deres for å konfrontere Nomadene.

programme.title: Gladiatorer
programme.desc: Bli med til det høye nord i Nord-Amerika og møt de ultimate krigerne som lever langs vannveiene her. Se når vårsmeltingen starter konkurransen og setter ørner opp mot hegrer, bjørner opp mot bjørner og libeller opp mot giftige kjempevannteger.

programme.title: Korallbyen
programme.desc: Oppdag den mest fantastiske byen av dem alle under bølgene, hvor romanser og migrerende pendlere yrer rundt korallrevets hovedveier. Følg en grønn havskilpadde på jakt etter kjærlighet, og slå deg ned med en kasuarfar som tar seg av sine nyfødte små.

programme.title: Korallbyen
programme.desc: Føl sommervarmens ankomst mens gigantiske sjøsnegler prøver å nedkjempe en invaderende gjeng med korallsultne sjøstjerner. Bli med revhaier på jakt etter nattmat, og bli imponert av den glatte kamuflasjen papegøyefisken bruker for å overleve natten.

programme.title: Orangutangenes jungelskole
programme.desc: Beni og Lala får uventet besøk av dyrlege Arga. Kesi får en ny venn på Bangamat Island, og Alejandra får et nytt syn på verden etter at ulykken på skogsskolen har gjort henne blind på et øye.

programme.title: Monsunens øy
programme.desc: Monsunstormer feier over den tropiske øya Sri Lanka, og virvlende tåke fører med seg regn som treffer det fjellrike innlandet. Det er starten på en reise gjennom de mange skiftende fasene av øyas skoger.

programme.title: Big Cat Country
programme.desc: I løpet av de siste ukene av tørketiden holder flokkene seg i nærheten av det eneste vannet som finnes i elven. Men i Luangwa er dette farlig – spesielt når lukten av en drept flodhest får Hollywood-flokken til å krysse elven.

programme.title: Big Cat Country
programme.desc: Hollywood-flokken med bare hunner har vært i eksil etter å ha blitt angrepet av de fire brødrene i Nomadene. Men lederen deres, Ava, bestemmer seg for å føre familien sørover til hjertet av territoriet deres for å konfrontere Nomadene.

programme.title: På dypt vann i Australia
programme.desc: Vi reiser til villmarken der Australias innlandsørken møter det varme, ugjestmilde Indiahavet. Biolog Lizzie Daly dykker sammen med tigerhaier, djevelskater og nomadiske skilpadder.

programme.title: Korallbyen
programme.desc: Oppdag den mest fantastiske byen av dem alle under bølgene, hvor romanser og migrerende pendlere yrer rundt korallrevets hovedveier. Følg en grønn havskilpadde på jakt etter kjærlighet, og slå deg ned med en kasuarfar som tar seg av sine nyfødte små.

programme.title: Monsunens øy

programme.title: Big Cat Country
programme.desc: I løpet av de siste ukene av tørketiden holder flokkene seg i nærheten av det eneste vannet som finnes i elven. Men i Luangwa er dette farlig – spesielt når lukten av en drept flodhest får Hollywood-flokken til å krysse elven.

programme.title: En livsreise
programme.desc: Hvis unge dyr klarer seg til de blir voksne, har de mye større sjanse for å overleve – men de møter mange utfordringer før de kan gå sine egne veier. Noen bruker måneder på å vokse opp, andre flere tiår, men alle har mye de må lære på veien, fra å bli kjent med kroppen sin og lære seg å skaffe mat selv, til å øve på å slåss og lære hvordan man får venner. De møter mange hindringer på veien, men hver eneste lille seier kan være forskjellen på liv og død.

programme.desc: Bli med til det høye nord i Nord-Amerika og møt de ultimate krigerne som lever langs vannveiene her. Se når vårsmeltingen starter konkurransen og setter ørner opp mot hegrer, bjørner opp mot bjørner og libeller opp mot giftige kjempevannteger.

programme.title: Evolusjonens mysterier
programme.desc: Har du noen gang lurt på hvorfor mandrillene har så fargerike fjes, hvorfor gribbene er skallet, eller hvorfor hammerhaiene har hammerformede hoder? Se hvordan dyrene har klart å overleve ved å utvikle seg fra halsen og opp.

programme.title: Korallbyen
programme.desc: Oppdag den mest fantastiske byen av dem alle under bølgene, hvor romanser og migrerende pendlere yrer rundt korallrevets hovedveier. Følg en grønn havskilpadde på jakt etter kjærlighet, og slå deg ned med en kasuarfar som tar seg av sine nyfødte små.

programme.title: Korallbyen
programme.desc: Føl sommervarmens ankomst mens gigantiske sjøsnegler prøver å nedkjempe en invaderende gjeng med korallsultne sjøstjerner. Bli med revhaier på jakt etter nattmat, og bli imponert av den glatte kamuflasjen papegøyefisken bruker for å overleve natten.

programme.title: Haiplaneten
programme.desc: Haiene har lært seg å utnytte enhver mulighet til å skaffe seg mat, med alt fra luftakrobatikk til kamuflasje og bakholdsangrep. Hvorfor har disse rovdyrene øverst på næringskjeden klart seg så bra?

programme.title: Livet på garden
programme.desc: Medan lauvet skiftar farge, skiftar dyra lynne. Verane Roger og Hamish duellerer om dominans, og høna Sally er rastlaus.

programme.title: Livet på garden
programme.desc: Sheila sine ni grisungar lagar liv og røre i elles keisame vinterdagar. Veren Hamish gjer kur på Bonnie, men ho er ikkje så interessert.

programme.title: Orangutangenes jungelskole
programme.desc: Teamet må prøve å finne Tulia og Zalipa, som har forsvunnet fra Palas Island. Etter månedvis med rekonvalesens vender Beni tilbake til skogsskolen, men han opplever et nytt tilbakeslag ved melkebøtten. Dyrlegene følger nøye med gravide Dilla.

programme.title: Monsunens øy
programme.desc: Yala nasjonalpark er et paradis for fugler, og her finnes 215 ulike fuglearter. Området har mange muligheter for foreldre som kan håndtere det stadig skiftende klimaet. Hver art må enten oppfostre ungene her eller finne seg et nytt hjem før tørketiden er over og monsunstormene begynner.

programme.title: Korallbyen
programme.desc: Oppdag den mest fantastiske byen av dem alle under bølgene, hvor romanser og migrerende pendlere yrer rundt korallrevets hovedveier. Følg en grønn havskilpadde på jakt etter kjærlighet, og slå deg ned med en kasuarfar som tar seg av sine nyfødte små.

programme.title: Korallbyen
programme.desc: Føl sommervarmens ankomst mens gigantiske sjøsnegler prøver å nedkjempe en invaderende gjeng med korallsultne sjøstjerner. Bli med revhaier på jakt etter nattmat, og bli imponert av den glatte kamuflasjen papegøyefisken bruker for å overleve natten.

programme.title: Irlands ville øyer med Eoin Warner
programme.desc: Vi starter på Rathlin, der lomviunger som ikke kan fly ennå, tar sjansen på å hoppe, og gylne harer ønsker daggryet velkommen. Deretter drar vi til Tory for å se brugder, delfiner og kjærlighetsdansen til den utrydningstruede åkerriksen. Til slutt følger vi søte røyskatter på Achill.

programme.desc: Medan lauvet skiftar farge, skiftar dyra lynne. Verane Roger og Hamish duellerer om dominans, og høna Sally er rastlaus.

programme.title: Rivalry in Music – Schonberg vs. Stravinsky
programme.desc: At the beginning of the 20th century, two famous composers were at the avant-garde while being at the antipodes: Igor Stravinsky, elegant and sophisticated, who revolutionized rhythm on the one hand – and on the other the intellectual and misanthropic Arnold Schoenberg with his visionary 12-tone technique. What began as a respectful meeting between these two composers soon turned into a bitter rivalry that led to a fundamental debate about progress and truth in music. . Subtitles available for this program with your remote control.

programme.title: Wagners Jews
programme.desc: Richard Wagner was notoriously anti-Semitic, and his writings on Jews were later embraced by Hitler and the Nazis. But for years, many of Wagner‘s closest associates were Jews - young musicians who became personally devoted to him, and provided crucial help to his work and career. Why were they drawn to him? And how could Wagner even accept their embrace? These questions are at the heart of ‘Wagner‘s Jews’, the first film to focus on Wagner‘s complex personal relationships with Jews. Filmed on location in Germany, Switzerland, and Italy, ‘Wagner‘s Jews’ reveals this remarkable story through archival sources, re-enactments, interviews, and performances of original musical works by Wagner‘s Jewish colleagues. Featuring Zubin Mehta and Leon Botstein among others, the film also explores the ongoing controversy over performing Wagner‘s music in Israel. The same questions asked in Wagner‘s time still resonate today: is it possible to separate the art from its creator? Can sublime music transcend prejudice and bigotry, and the weight of history?Subtitles available for this program with your remote controlSubtítulos disponibles para este programa con su control remoto.

programme.title: Madeleine Peyroux at Bordeauxs Grand-Theâtre
programme.desc: Born in the United States, Madeleine Peyroux is a jazz singer and guitarist with an unclassifiable style and an exceptional artistic personality, carried by a voice that is both soft and husky, with blues and folk accents. After spending part of her childhood in the United States, she moved to France as a teenager where she joined her first jazz bands. An atypical artist, she performs a lot in the street while participating in festivals and creating her own albums. In 2004, she had an international success with Careless Love. Other albums have been released since, including the recent Anthem (2018), the title of which is taken from a Leonard Cohen song.

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: Antonio Canal, known as Canaletto, and Francesco Guardi are the best known 18th century painters of the urban Venetian landscape. In minute detail, they painted iconic views of the Venetian Republic, destined for rich foreign visitors. “Maria della Salute from the Grand Canal in Venice” by Canaletto and “Venice: Piazza San Marco” by Guardi followed this trend. Later Venice also inspired Paul Signac’s “The Green Veil, Venice”. Go on a voyage of discovery...Enjoy your visit!

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Les chefs televises Aldo Zilli et Ching He-Huang s’affrontent lors de ce Road Trip à travers le sud-est de l’Angleterre, accompagnes des experts Natasha Raskin et Paul Laidlaw.Aldo mise sur une bague en or malgre les conseils des experts, tandis que Ching espère que des antiquites d’origine orientale feront un beau score aux enchères dans le nord de Londres.En chemin, Aldo fait une halte pour rencontrer Jill, une doyenne de 200 ans qui fournissait autrefois la population en farine. De son côte, l’amoureuse des animaux Ching decouvre l’histoire d’un homme qui, au XIXe siècle, a risque le ridicule et la ruine pour proteger le betail.

programme.title: Photo Contest
programme.desc: In each episode of Photo Contest, two contestants compete on an imposed theme such as rockn roll, Japan or architecture. They have one hour to take the best possible photographs before editing them for 30 minutes in a studio. The photographs they have selected are then presented to Agnès Gregoire, editor-in-chief of PHOTO magazine, who will have to choose the best photographer.

programme.title: Artists Workshop
programme.desc: In the Artists workshop series, we offer you a privileged meeting with an artist, or the discovery of an artist or an important place for the history of art. Whether they are painters, visual artists, sculptors... These people all have the same passion for art and this series is an opportunity to enter their different universes, to discover what drives them, inspires them and maybe that will give rise to vocations.

programme.title: An hour with
programme.desc: Take an hour break to discover the work of a French painter, Georges Seurat. You will discover his labour with « Ile de France » landscape, Study for « a Sunday afternoon at the grande jatte », Study for « La grande jatte ».

programme.title: An hour with
programme.desc: Take an hour break to discover the work of a French painter, Jean-François Millet. You will discover his labour with Naked woman sleeping, Two bathers or The church at greville.

programme.title: Video Art
programme.desc: Street art, performances, digital art... Because the new forms of Art and their invigorating character, even iconoclastic, have been able to attract a new public until now refractory to go inside the interior of our beautiful museums.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: Phil Grabsky, realisateur recompense à plusieurs reprises, pose un regard neuf sur celui qui est sans conteste l’artiste le plus aime au monde en utilisant les mots du peintre lui-meme. Moi, Claude Monet revèle de nouvelles facettes de l’homme qui a donne naissance au mouvement impressionniste grâce à un tableau et qui fut certainement l’un des peintres les plus influents et renommes du XIXe et du debut du XXe siècle. Tourne à travers l’Europe, sur les lieux où il a peint, Moi, Claude Monet est une exploration filmique inedite et intime de certains des decors cultes les plus apprecies de l’art occidental.

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: A key artist of the Italian Renaissance, Raffaello Santi (1483-1520) developed a classical art form, based on drawing, which made him the model for many painters in the following centuries. His favourite theme was the Madonna: you can admire, for example, “The Sistine Madonna” in Dresden and the “The Virgin and Child with St John the Baptist” in the Louvre. Notice the gentle harmony and the delicate sensuality in “The Three Graces” or the powerful human presence in “The Portrait of Baldassare Castiglione”.Enjoy your visit!

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: “Happiness is an angel with a serious face.” These words by the Italian painter Amadeo Modgliani define to perfection the portraits which made him famous… He reinvented the icon, with his oval faces, his elongated necks and lapis-lazuli eyes which are strangely expressive even when robbed of substance. You will be able to appreciate the simplicity of his figures, the restraint in his lines and colours, especially when you admire “The Woman with the Blue Eyes” or the “Portrait of Anna Zborowska”. Enjoy your visit!

programme.title: Sketchbook
programme.desc: Raphael Federici (street artist), Marine Goodmorning (illustrator), Luca Fiore (cartoonist) and Harry Boudchicha (drawing teacher) reveal their best drawing techniques. Each episode focuses on a specific subject:movement, oil painting, shadows, hair... For the first 10 minutes, each artist gives a theoretical lesson illustrated by sketches. Then they each start working on their creation. Finally, they end with a debrief, comparingand explaining their techniques.

programme.title: Little Sketches
programme.desc: In 64 fun episodes, Gia-Haï Phan teaches you all the sketching techniques you need.

programme.title: Architectures
programme.desc: The Villa Dall’Ava, designed by Rem Koolhaas in 1991, is an iconic project located on the heights of Saint-Cloud, near Paris. This house is distinguished by its bold architecture and geometric forms that challenge the traditional conventions of a typical villa. The structure consists of shifted volumes, with two apartment boxes appearing to float above the pool, creating an impression of lightness.Koolhaas faced significant technical and aesthetic challenges during the design of the villa. On one hand, he dealt with opposition from neighbors concerned about the visual and structural impact of the house on the surrounding landscape. On the other hand, he had to devise ingenious solutions to support the weight of the boxes and the pool, which holds 65 tons of water. The villa incorporates carefully planned internal supports and a drainage system to ensure the stability of the structure.In addition to these challenges, Villa Dall’Ava serves as a reflection on modern living and the rel.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.sub-title: Degas : une passion de la perfection
programme.desc: Exhibition on screen nous emmène à travers les rues de Paris puis au cœur d’une superbe exposition au Fitzwilliam Museum de Cambridge, dont l’impressionnante collection d’œuvres de Degas est la plus representative de Grande-Bretagne. Ayant beneficie d’un accès exclusif à une grande variete d’œuvres rares, le film raconte l’histoire fascinante de la quete de perfection de Degas à travers l’experimentation de nouvelles techniques et les leçons apprises en etudiant les grands maîtres.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.sub-title: Leonard à la National Gallery de Londres
programme.desc: Un evenement remarquable sest produit à la National Gallery de Londres lorsque la plus grande collection jamais constituee de peintures de Leonard de Vinci a ete reunie dans une exposition unique : Leonard de Vinci : peintre à la cour de Milan. Leonard est reconnu comme etant peut-etre le plus grand peintre et sculpteur de tous les temps, mais ses talents ne sarretaient pas là. Ce film raconte sa vie et setend sur Leonard le visionnaire, Leonard linventeur. Depuis lendroit où il a vecu ses dernières annees au Château du Clos Luce en France, nous verrons que Leonard de Vinci etait peut-etre lincarnation meme de lesprit de la Renaissance.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.sub-title: Painting the Modern Garden - Monet to Matisse
programme.desc: Passionne d’horticulture, Monet reste sans conteste le maître de la peinture de jardins dans l’histoire de l’art, mais il n’etait pas seul. Des artistes tels que Van Gogh, Bonnard, Picasso et Matisse ont utilise le jardin comme thème fort de leur œuvre. Ces grands artistes, ainsi que bien d’autres noms celèbres, sont rassembles dans une exposition innovante du Cleveland Museum of Art et de la Royal Gallery of Arts de Londres. De l’exposition elle-meme à la beaute des jardins d’artistes comme celui de Monet à Giverny, nous partons en voyage pour decouvrir comment le jardin moderne etait utilise pour explorer de nouvelles idees radicales et merveilleuses.

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: Discover or re-discover the masterpieces of the greatest painters of history through our documentary series Within The Frame. From impressionists to surrealists, from Leonard Da Vinci to Paul Cezanne, every episode will immerge you into a virtual tour of a paintings collection. You will see the most impressive paintings ever made and wont miss a single detail.

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: Antonio Canal, known as Canaletto, and Francesco Guardi are the best known 18th century painters of the urban Venetian landscape. In minute detail, they painted iconic views of the Venetian Republic, destined for rich foreign visitors. “Maria della Salute from the Grand Canal in Venice” by Canaletto and “Venice: Piazza San Marco” by Guardi followed this trend. Later Venice also inspired Paul Signac’s “The Green Veil, Venice”. Go on a voyage of discovery...Enjoy your visit!

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Licône de la pop et actrice Claire Grogan retrouve son compatriote de Glasgow, l’acteur Alex Norton de Taggart, pour une quete de tresors antiques lucratifs. Anita Manning et Paul Laidlaw sont là pour leur prodiguer leurs conseils d’experts.Anita et Alex se retrouvent embarques dans un Boat Trip dantiquites, evoquant leurs souvenirs denfance sur le Clyde. Pendant ce temps, Claire et Paul decouvrent de près à quoi ressemblait le château de Stirling au XVIe siècle.Le resultat de la vente aux enchères à Ayr dependra d’une dame nue.

programme.title: The Real Thing - Real Life in a Copycat World
programme.desc: Sixty Eiffel towers, a dozen of Great Pyramids of Giza, thirty leaning towers of Pisa, over eighty copies of the White House… Architecture doppelgangers are multiplying all over the world. Between lucrative investments, architectural piracy, and modern tourism, each of these places expresses an aspect of how our planet is being transformed through globalization. Do these places have something in common? How different are they from copies of the past? Are they more than just copies?

programme.title: Women Sculptors, neither muse nor model
programme.desc: For very long time, women were excluded from doing sculpture. Yet, they never gave up struggling for their recognition as artists. As Women Painters, this one-off recounts the fate of the first female sculptors, and showcases their works, that are at last being acknowledged today...

programme.title: Artists Workshop
programme.desc: Joaquin Boz habite et travaille à Buenos Aires. C’est ici, dans la capitale de l’Argentine, qu’il pratique son art à mi-chemin entre abstraction et performance corporelle. Sa peinture est recouverte de couches toujours plus nombreuses. Ces tâches, ces mouvements, ces traits et ces raclures, sont le fruit de la transmission des formes et des couleurs depuis son corps vers la toile dans une performance physique de l’artiste qui puise son inspiration dans le courant expressionniste.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: « J’envie les Japonais », ecrivait Van Gogh à son frère, Theo. Grâce à l’exposition sur laquelle est base ce film, « Van Gogh et le Japon », au musee Van Gogh d’Amsterdam, on comprend pourquoi. Bien que Vincent van Gogh n’ait jamais visite le Japon, il reste le pays qui a eu le plus d’influence sur lui et son œuvre. En se rendant dans les galeries d’art japonais à Paris et en creant sa propre image du Japon après des recherches approfondies, des collections d’estampes et de longues discussions avec d’autres artistes, la decouverte des œuvres japonaises entraîna la carrière de Van Gogh dans une nouvelle direction très excitante.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: En 2013, la Norvège celebra le 150e anniversaire de la naissance dEdvard Munch (1863-1944), lune des figures proeminentes de lart moderne. Munch 150, coproduite par le Musee national et le Musee Munch, est dejà acclamee comme « lexposition dune vie ». Linteret general est enorme, comme le temoigne le resultat record de la mise aux enchères publiques de lun de ses quatre tableaux, Le Cri, soit 120 millions de dollars. Cette presentation vous amènera dans les coulisses de la mise en place de cette exposition, en plus de comprendre une visite guidee de la Norvège qui brossera la biographie de cet homme dont la vie sest etalee de la moitie du 19ème siècle jusquà loccupation allemande lors de la Seconde Guerre mondiale.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Deux stars des annees 70, le crooner cool Tony Christie et la royaute pop Jimmy Osmond, sont accompagnes des experts Catherine Southon et Margie Cooper. Partant de la ville de Loughborough, dans le Leicestershire, ils se dirigent vers une vente aux enchères à Stoke-on-Trent, dans le Staffordshire.Tony profite dune visite à Coalbrookdale, le lieu où des techniques innovantes ont ete developpees, marquant le debut de la revolution industrielle. De son côte, le passionne de voitures Jimmy soffre un tour sur le circuit historique de Donington.La grande finale aux enchères comprend un moment de chant en groupe unique en son genre. Mais quel maestro musical remportera la victoire ?

programme.title: The decisive moment
programme.desc: In each episode of the decisive moment, we welcome a photographer whom we have asked to select three photos that have marked their life and their career. Whether they are reporters, portraitists or fashion photographers, they all have the same passion and will share it with us.

programme.title: The Chateaux of France, Living Splendors
programme.desc: La vision des tours massives du château d’Angers est un choc pour l’œil comme pour l’esprit. En ce lieux mysterieux, se cache la symbolique obscure de la grandiose teinture de l’Apocalypse, de la fin du monde et du jugement dernier. Mais ce château de cœur de ville possède aussi un voisinage d’artistes, d’antiquaires et d’artisans, tous passionnes d’histoire angevine et qui collaborent avec les representants du Centre des Monuments Nationaux, gestionnaire de ce lieu historique. Ainsi cette bâtisse destinee à la guerre et qui fut longtemps une sombre prison, devient par le jeu des volontes conjuguees un pôle touristique et d’insertion pour des jeunes de tous horizons.

programme.title: Museum stories
programme.desc: There are few artists who, during their lifetime, prepare the posterity of their work with meticulousness, secrecy and determination. The symbolist painter Gustave Moreau, born in 1826, is one of them. In this museum that he created with his hand, his paintings are available to us, more than a century after his death, and tell us the story of a tormented and enigmatic man, borrowed from a mysticism that will one of the most important painters of the Symbolist movement.

programme.title: Museum stories
programme.desc: The Museum of Hunting and Nature in Paris opens the doors of the imagination of our forests, our jungles, our savannah, and offers a very special experience, to the discovery of animals, and of the relationship, sometimes tragic, sometimes sublime, that we have with them. It is an ode to nature, elevated to the rank of art, and to its wild, simple, ferocious beauty.

programme.title: Museum stories
programme.desc: What is the Arab world? It is not easy to define this expression as it brings together territories as immense as they are diverse, cultures which share common traits but which each have their specificities. The Museum of the Institute of the Arab World endeavors to offer a vision of this world as rich as it is diverse, through numerous archaeological pieces, treasures of history and culture. But also, thanks to contemporary works, which help to tell what the Arab world is today, in a world shaken by cultural globalization and the questioning of the identities inherent in our modern society.

programme.title: Museum stories
programme.desc: The city of Boulogne Billancourt experienced rapid development in the interwar period. Industrialists, filmmakers, architects, painters and sculptors test their creativity there. It is this impetus that the Museum of the 1930s would have liked to transcribe, created a collection of works of art from this period, first constituted by purchases in galleries, flea markets or auction houses, then mainly by donations. More than 1,500 sculptures, 800 paintings, 300 pieces of furniture… A heterogeneous whole, testimony of an era and a place in which the artistic excitement unfolds, and opens the way to a number of creative adventures of the 20th century.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: L’histoire de la mort et de la resurrection du Christ domine la culture occidentale depuis 2000 ans. C’est probablement l’un des evenements les plus marquants de l’histoire, que l’on retrouve dans les Évangiles aussi bien que dans les tableaux des plus grands artistes. Ce long metrage explore l’histoire de Pâques dans l’art, depuis l’epoque des premiers chretiens jusqu’à nos jours. Tourne à Jerusalem, aux Etats-Unis et en Europe, le film explore les differentes representations de Pâques à travers les âges et nous dresse ainsi un portrait de notre histoire commune.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: Leonard de Vinci est l’un des artistes les plus adules au monde. De nombreux films et series documentaires se sont interesses à son genie hors du commun, sans pour autant preter attention à ce qu’il y a de plus parlant : son art. Les tableaux et dessins incomparables de Leonard de Vinci seront au centre de notre film et Exhibition on screen vous presentera la totalite des tableaux qui lui sont attribues. Marquant les 500 ans de la mort de ce genie, ce documentaire est une reference sur Leonard de Vinci, le premier à raconter son histoire dans sa globalite.

programme.title: Art Quiz
programme.desc: Test your knowledge and your memory in fine arts, architecture, photography, street art and a dozen other topics with our Art Quiz popups !

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Deux legendes de la comedie britannique, Ronni Ancona et Jan Ravens, sont accompagnees des antiquaires Phil Serrell et James Braxton pour ce Road Trip. Partant de la ville de Redcar, dans le North Yorkshire, ils se dirigent vers une vente aux enchères à Stockport, dans le Cheshire.Jan se laisse emporter et depense tout son budget, tandis que Ronni se regale dune paire de bottes en verre très kitsch.Lors dun detour, Jan decouvre pourquoi les habitants de Hartlepool pensaient quun singe etait un Français, et Ronni reste bouche bee lorsque Braxton enlève ses vetements. Sacre moment !

programme.title: Photo Contest
programme.desc: In each episode of Photo Contest, two contestants compete on an imposed theme such as rockn roll, Japan or architecture. They have one hour to take the best possible photographs before editing them for 30 minutes in a studio. The photographs they have selected are then presented to Agnès Gregoire, editor-in-chief of PHOTO magazine, who will have to choose the best photographer.

programme.title: Artists Workshop
programme.desc: Gutenberg est considere comme le père de l’imprimerie moderne. La petite histoire raconte qu’il se serait inspire du pressoir à raisin utilise par les vignerons pour inventer sa machine. De cette anecdote historique, deux artistes ont entrepris d’editer un livre qui etanchera la soif de n’importe quel lecteur gourmand. Dans cet episode, nous rencontrerons Luz et Anaïs, deux artistes opposees et absolument complementaires.

programme.title: An hour with
programme.desc: Take an hour break to discover the work of a French painter, Theodore Gericault. You will discover his labour with An Officer of the Imperial horse guards, Heroic landscape with fisherman or The Horse race.

programme.title: An hour with
programme.desc: Take an hour break to discover the work of an Italian painter, Amedeo Modigliani. You will discover his labour with Caryatid, Lolotte or others portraits.

programme.title: Video Art
programme.desc: Street art, performances, digital art... Because the new forms of Art and their invigorating character, even iconoclastic, have been able to attract a new public until now refractory to go inside the interior of our beautiful museums.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: Narrated by Gillian Anderson, this episode of Exhibition on Screen follows the footsteps of French artists such as Renoir and Monet, the American Impressionist movement forged its own path. Painted over a period of 40 years, these paintings reveal the United States both as a nation and as a creative breeding ground. The history of this movement is closely linked to the love of gardens and the desire to preserve nature in a country undergoing rapid urbanization. This enchanting journey through workshops, gardens and famous sites in the USA, UK and France is a feast for the eyes.

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: The man with the long greying beard who we find in this self-portrait is the painter Camille Pissarro (1830-1903). A keen follower of the Impressionist movement, the artist specialised in landscapes around Paris, often painted in winter, such as the “Chestnut Tress at Louveciennes” or the urban landscapes of Montmartre. Towards the end of his life, his painting technique changed and he turned towards Neo-Impressionism, for example in the “Seine River and Louvre Palace”.Enjoy your visit!

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: Leader of the School of Pont-Aven, Paul Gauguin, the most exotic of French artists, paved the way for modern painting. There were two main themes which marked his work: Brittany and Tahiti. A rebel, he rejected copying reality in favour of exploring more delicate painting techniques. You will discover here the most important milestones in his work: from “Four Breton Girls” to “Tahitian Women on the Beach”, by way of the surprising “Self Portrait with Yellow Christ”. Enjoy your visit!

programme.title: Sketchbook
programme.desc: Raphael Federici (street artist), Marine Goodmorning (illustrator), Luca Fiore (cartoonist) and Harry Boudchicha (drawing teacher) reveal their best drawing techniques. Each episode focuses on a specific subject:movement, oil painting, shadows, hair... For the first 10 minutes, each artist gives a theoretical lesson illustrated by sketches. Then they each start working on their creation. Finally, they end with a debrief, comparingand explaining their techniques.

programme.title: Little Sketches
programme.desc: In 64 fun episodes, Gia-Haï Phan teaches you all the sketching techniques you need.

programme.title: Architectures
programme.desc: Lhôtel Van Eetvelde, une maison particulière de trois etages, construite entre 1895 et 1897, à Bruxelles, Avenue Palmerston. Lhomme qui la fait construire: Edmond Van Eetvelde, un haut fonctionnaire dont la carrière est en pleine ascension. Pour construire sa maison, Van Eetvelde choisit Victor Horta, un jeune archi-tecte davant garde, lun des createurs du mouvement de lart nouveau.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: Pablo Picasso est l’un des plus grands artistes au monde, et jusqu’à sa mort en 1973, il etait le plus prolifique. Comment tout a commence ? Comment s’est construit Picasso ? Après avoir ete trop longtemps ignorees, il est temps de se concentrer sur les jeunes annees de l’artiste et son education qui lui ont permis d’accomplir l’extraordinaire. Trois villes ont joue un rôle-cle : Malaga, Barcelone et Paris. "Le jeune Picasso" les traverse et explore leur influence sur l’artiste, en analysant des œuvres specifiques de ses debuts.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: Cette exposition très attendue à la Royal Academy of Arts etait la toute première retrospective consacree au portrait dÉdouard Manet. Couvrant lensemble de la carrière de cet artiste enigmatique et parfois controverse, lexposition a rassemble des œuvres provenant dEurope, dAsie et des États-Unis. Le portrait de Manet na jamais fait lobjet dune exposition, bien quil represente environ la moitie de sa production artistique. Il a peint sa famille, ses amis et les personnalites litteraires, politiques et artistiques de lepoque, donnant vie non seulement à ses sujets mais aussi à la societe parisienne.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.sub-title: Le curieux monde de Hieronymus Bosch
programme.desc: La ville natale de Bosch aux Pays-Bas ne possède pas de tableaux du peintre et pourtant, pour la grande exposition « Visions of Genius » qui a eu lieu à l’anniversaire de sa mort en 2016, le musee Noordbrabants a reussi à reunir la presque totalite des tableaux et dessins de Bosch. C’est en 2008 que le directeur du musee a commence sa tournee dans les plus grands musees d’Europe et Etats-Unis pour en persuader les directeurs de preter au musee Noordbrabants leurs œuvres, en echange d’un travail d’analyse et de recherche sur les tableaux en pret. Ainsi « Hieronymus Bosch. Visions of Genius » a ete l’exposition la plus ambitieuse dediee au peintre hollandais. Ce documentaire sera une plongee dans l’univers etrange et visionnaire de Hieronymus Bosch.

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: Discover or re-discover the masterpieces of the greatest painters of history through our documentary series Within The Frame. From impressionists to surrealists, from Leonard Da Vinci to Paul Cezanne, every episode will immerge you into a virtual tour of a paintings collection. You will see the most impressive paintings ever made and wont miss a single detail.

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: Genre pictural existant depuis l’Antiquite, la nature morte connut un regain d’interet à partir du XVIIe siècle dans la peinture europeenne. Representation composee d’elements inanimes, elle peut se limiter à la table d’un repas, comme dans le frugal Dessert de gaufrettes de Lubin Baugin, ou d’animaux chasses comme dans la Nature morte au faisan de Jean-Baptiste Oudry. Retrouvez egalement des natures mortes celèbres de Chardin, Cezanne et Van Gogh.Bonne visite !

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Les animatrices vedettes Nicki Chapman et Jules Hudson sechappent à la campagne pour partir à la chasse aux antiquites avec Natasha Raskin et Phillip Serrell. Cest une bataille filles contre garçons, chaque equipe disposant de 400 £. Le voyage commence à Wormsley, dans le Herefordshire, puis les deux equipes se dirigent vers le pays de Galles et lOxfordshire, avant de finir à North Finchley, à Londres, pour une vente aux enchères.En chemin, les filles rencontrent un fabricant de sabots qui sculpte les chaussures à la main. Pendant ce temps, les garçons se rendent au Herefordshire Light Infantry Museum pour en apprendre davantage sur l’implication du regiment à Gallipoli.

programme.title: Museum stories
programme.desc: There are few artists who, during their lifetime, prepare the posterity of their work with meticulousness, secrecy and determination. The symbolist painter Gustave Moreau, born in 1826, is one of them. In this museum that he created with his hand, his paintings are available to us, more than a century after his death, and tell us the story of a tormented and enigmatic man, borrowed from a mysticism that will one of the most important painters of the Symbolist movement.

programme.title: Museum stories
programme.desc: The Museum of Hunting and Nature in Paris opens the doors of the imagination of our forests, our jungles, our savannah, and offers a very special experience, to the discovery of animals, and of the relationship, sometimes tragic, sometimes sublime, that we have with them. It is an ode to nature, elevated to the rank of art, and to its wild, simple, ferocious beauty.

programme.title: Museum stories
programme.desc: What is the Arab world? It is not easy to define this expression as it brings together territories as immense as they are diverse, cultures which share common traits but which each have their specificities. The Museum of the Institute of the Arab World endeavors to offer a vision of this world as rich as it is diverse, through numerous archaeological pieces, treasures of history and culture. But also, thanks to contemporary works, which help to tell what the Arab world is today, in a world shaken by cultural globalization and the questioning of the identities inherent in our modern society.

programme.title: Museum stories
programme.desc: The city of Boulogne Billancourt experienced rapid development in the interwar period. Industrialists, filmmakers, architects, painters and sculptors test their creativity there. It is this impetus that the Museum of the 1930s would have liked to transcribe, created a collection of works of art from this period, first constituted by purchases in galleries, flea markets or auction houses, then mainly by donations. More than 1,500 sculptures, 800 paintings, 300 pieces of furniture… A heterogeneous whole, testimony of an era and a place in which the artistic excitement unfolds, and opens the way to a number of creative adventures of the 20th century.

programme.title: Artists Workshop
programme.desc: In the Artists workshop series, we offer you a privileged meeting with an artist, or the discovery of an artist or an important place for the history of art. Whether they are painters, visual artists, sculptors... These people all have the same passion for art and this show is an opportunity to enter their different universes, to discover what drives them, inspires them and maybe that will give rise to vocations.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: Lucian Freud, lun des peintres britanniques les plus celèbres de notre epoque, est egalement lun des rares artistes du XXe siècle à setre represente dans un autoportrait avec une telle constance. Ses autoportraits donnent un aperçu fascinant à la fois de sa personnalite et de son evolution en tant que peintre, depuis son premier portrait peint en 1939 jusquau dernier. Grâce à des entretiens fascinants avec danciens modèles, des amis et deminents experts, ce documentaire intensement captivant revèle lœuvre dun maître qui represente une etude captivante sur la dynamique du vieillissement et le processus dautorepresentation.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.sub-title: Vermeer and music - the art of love and leisure
programme.desc: La National Gallery de Londres propose un nouveau regard sur lun des plus grands artistes de tous les temps, Johannes Vermeer. Il est le peintre de la celèbre toile “La Jeune Fille à la perle”. Dans une exposition intitulee "Vermeer et la musique : Lart de lamour et des loisirs

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Les coachs vocaux et couple marie David et Carrie Grant echangent lharmonie vocale contre une competition acharnee dantiquites. Avec laide des experts Will Axon et Mark Stacey, le couple decouvre des objets inattendus à vendre lors d’une vente aux enchères dans la campagne du Norfolk.David fait une halte sur un terrain dherbe en plein cœur de Cambridge, où aujourdhui les enfants jouent et les chiens se promènent, mais qui etait en realite le berceau du football. Pendant ce temps, Carrie decouvre comment Letchworth Garden City a declenche une revolution dans la conception des villes.

programme.title: The decisive moment
programme.desc: In this episode, well be talking with Jennifer Khordi, photographer. She is a former computer professional from the Bronx. She started with street photography in the late 1980s and then moved into travel and portrait photography. She has spent the last few years photographing the moon, the Milky Way and New York City.

programme.title: The Chateaux of France, Living Splendors
programme.desc: The Azay-le-Rideau Castle is nestled at the core of the old city and surrounded by a romantic park, the castle seems to be built on water. This intimate, almost hidden edifice is endowed with an ageless charm and a powerful bond with history. Today, it is renowned as one of the most representative works of the period, revealing a whole new conception of architecture and life. It was indeed a place meant to house knowledgeable ladies of the time. Today, this Renaissance treasure counts more than 300 000 visitors a year and represents a considerable economic asset for the city. It is also the combination of expertise, skills, character and devotion of its caretakers which animates this splendid castle with a historic soul.

programme.title: Vasarely, the illusionist
programme.desc: As a visual artist, painter and theorist, Vasarely was determined to challenge the art of the easel and develop an art form that was "in tune with the times" and aimed at the widest possible audience. In his quest for "functional" art, he wanted his new kinetic plastic art to help beautify the city and thereby transform society. Today, he remains the celebrated inventor of Op art.

programme.title: Firminy by Le Corbusier
programme.desc: The Firminy site represents one of the strong ideas of Le Corbusier, the merger and coexistence between three human activities: cultural life and leisure, sports, and worship.

programme.title: Street Art Lyon, viewpoints
programme.desc: The official art (with the co-ownerships) of the painted walls of Lyon hides its origins: the art of the wild graffiti.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: Qui etait Frida Kahlo ? Voyagez dans la vie dune veritable icône, decouvrez son art et la verite qui se cache derrière sa vie souvent mouvementee. La combinaison dinterviews, de commentaires et dune exploration detaillee de lart de Kahlo, offre un tresor de couleurs et un festin de vitalite. Ce documentaire personnel et intime offre un accès privilegie à ses œuvres, et met en lumière sa creativite febrile, sa resilience et sa soif inegalee pour la vie.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.sub-title: Canaletto and the Art of Venice
programme.desc: Canaletto et l’art de Venise, un voyage en immersion dans la vie et l’art du celèbre peintre de Venise. Aucun artiste n’a su mieux capturer l’essence et le charme de cette ville que Giovanni Antonio Canal, plus connu sous le nom de Canaletto. La remarquable collection regroupe plus de 200 tableaux, dessins et eaux-fortes nous permet de partir à la decouverte du talent artistique de Canaletto, de ses contemporains et de la ville qu’il a su reproduire avec genie. Le film ouvre egalement les portes de deux residences royales officielles, Buckingham Palace et le château de Windsor, pour nous en apprendre plus sur l’artiste et sur Joseph Smith, l’homme qui a fait decouvrir Canaletto à la Grande-Bretagne.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.sub-title: Matisse au MoMA et à la Tate Modern
programme.desc: Decouvrez l’œuvre de Matisse à travers les expositions de la Tate Modern à Londres et du MoMA de New York (2014) et profitez de la performance originale de la danseuse etoile du Royal Ballet Zenaida Yanowsky, qui interprète les couleurs et le dynamisme de la peinture de Matisse sur la musique jazz de Courtney Pine. Ponctue d’entrevues avec des experts ainsi que d’images d’archives rares de Matisse au travail, ce documentaire permettra d’apprecier tout particulièrement le dernier chapitre de la carrière du peintre et notamment ses gouaches decoupees.

programme.title: Art Quiz
programme.desc: Test your knowledge and your memory in fine arts, architecture, photography, street art and a dozen other topics with our Art Quiz popups !

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: Discover or re-discover the masterpieces of the greatest painters of history through our documentary series Within The Frame. From impressionists to surrealists, from Leonard Da Vinci to Paul Cezanne, every episode will immerge you into a virtual tour of a paintings collection. You will see the most impressive paintings ever made and wont miss a single detail.

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: Established as a pictorial genre in its own right during the Renaissance, the female nude became one of the most important subjects in European painting. Under pretexts both mythological (Titian’s “Venus of Urbino”) and biblical (Rembrandt’s “Bathsheba at her Bath”) or Oriental (Ingres’“Great Odalisque”), the female body was unveiled. These pretexts vanish with Manet’s “Olympia”, a simple portrayal of a contemporary woman naked, which resulted in scandal.Enjoy your visit!

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Licône de la pop et actrice Claire Grogan retrouve son compatriote de Glasgow, l’acteur Alex Norton de Taggart, pour une quete de tresors antiques lucratifs. Anita Manning et Paul Laidlaw sont là pour leur prodiguer leurs conseils d’experts.Anita et Alex se retrouvent embarques dans un Boat Trip dantiquites, evoquant leurs souvenirs denfance sur le Clyde. Pendant ce temps, Claire et Paul decouvrent de près à quoi ressemblait le château de Stirling au XVIe siècle.Le resultat de la vente aux enchères à Ayr dependra d’une dame nue.

programme.title: Photo Contest
programme.desc: In each episode of Photo Contest, two contestants compete on an imposed theme such as rockn roll, Japan or architecture. They have one hour to take the best possible photographs before editing them for 30 minutes in a studio. The photographs they have selected are then presented to Agnès Gregoire, editor-in-chief of PHOTO magazine, who will have to choose the best photographer.

programme.title: Artists Workshop
programme.desc: In the Artists workshop series, we offer you a privileged meeting with an artist, or the discovery of an artist or an important place for the history of art. Whether they are painters, visual artists, sculptors... These people all have the same passion for art and this series is an opportunity to enter their different universes, to discover what drives them, inspires them and maybe that will give rise to vocations.

programme.title: An hour with
programme.desc: Take an hour break to discover the work of a French painter, Pierre Bonnard. You will discover his labour with Woman dozing on a bed, Summer in Normandy or The beach in low tide.

programme.title: Luanas Kitchen
programme.desc: Discover an Italian culinary staple: ravioli. Luana Belmondo, accompanied by her son Alessandro, makes her recipe for ricotta arugula ravioli with artichoke and almond sauce. The duo also prepare choco ravioli stuffed with pistachio custard and strawberry coulis.

programme.title: Namaste Yoga
programme.sub-title: Reconnect and Refine: Hip Opening and Abdominal Strengthening
programme.desc: Connect with the essence of your being with Reconnect and Refine. This exhilarating sequence encourages you to find comfort in the present moment, and let go of preconceived expectations or agendas. It is not about where you are going, but where you are.

programme.title: Home training
programme.desc: This episode of Home Training features an intense cardio workout. Guillaume and Sabrina guide you through a series of exercises, including high knees, lunges, and lateral movements. The focus is on endurance and energy burn, with dynamic moves engaging the entire body. As always, they emphasize the importance of warming up and staying hydrated for a safe session. Get ready to sweat and boost your cardio in a fun and motivating atmosphere!

programme.title: Pilates
programme.desc: Stay in shape with our pilates courses!

programme.title: Namaste Yoga
programme.sub-title: Home is at Heart: Open and Strengthen Your Shoulders
programme.desc: Une sequence energisante, "Le cœur est votre maison" vous invite à ressentir plutôt qu’à forcer les postures. Explorez votre hauteur tout en gardant l’intention de garder le cœur ouvert et l’esprit leger. Profitez de l’energie que vous creez avec ce flow dynamique.

programme.title: Deco Masters
programme.desc: Its off to another week of competition. As every Monday, the four contestants have a meeting in the workshop in Brussels before they go head to head on their own building sites. Its an opportunity to test the mettle of their opponents, and the first to claim the title of ace decorator is Davide. At 39, he owns a gîte which he is currently redecorating, so hes not short of practice.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Nous entamerons ce periple près de la Rochelle pour en apprendre un peu plus sur l’elevage des fameuses moules de bouchot mais aussi une technique bien particulière pour les cuisiner. Nous partirons ensuite pour un tour de France des meilleures huîtres : direction Cancale, Arcachon, Montpellier et enfin Oleron pour connaître les differentes methodes d’elevage et s’y retrouver un peu plus parmi toutes les espèces de l’hexagone. Julie cuisinera une fricassee de berniques, les petits chapeaux chinois qui recouvrent les rochers du littoral mais aussi des palourdes roses meconnues du grand public. Nous poursuivrons notre route dans le Finistère pour rencontrer Sylvain, le seul eleveur d’ormeau du pays puis à Meru où se trouve encore des ateliers magnifiant ce sublime materiau. Le Chef Jean-Marie Baudic nous cuisine les coquilles Saint-Jacques comme personne.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Julie prend la direction de la Bourgogne pour decouvrir des races anciennes de volaille reintroduites en France grâce au travail de l’eleveur Fred Menager. Nous nous rapprocherons ensuite de l’Auvergne pour decouvrir comment est attribue le fameux Label Rouge et le rôle des organismes certificateurs … car il est important de savoir ce qui atterri dans nos assiettes. Julie se rendra aussi dans la Drôme pour cuisiner de la pintade avant de se diriger vers le Perigord pour preparer un civet de dindon. Installee dans sa petite Micheline, Julie remontera ensuite vers le centre pour decouvrir un etonnant fabricant de mouche qui utilise des plumes de coqs !

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Lets hit the roads of France to discover shellfish. Well visit Brittany, then the Normandy coast where fishing is the regional sport, and Corsica, where the far northeast of the island lives to the rhythm of lobster. Julie takes us to cook lobster, crab with a very special recipe, and langoustines.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Honey was the first sweet condiment in history! It has also been known and consumed as a remedy since Antiquity. In France, we find an infinite variety of honey: acacia, chestnut, fir, rosemary, orange, spruce, oak, linden or lavender... Well cross forests, fields and even towns, as bees also forage in urbanized areas. Well then cook up emblematic recipes like Vercel gingerbread. Finally, well discover the European dark bee. Protecting this 80-million-year-old bee has become the spearhead of some passionate beekeepers.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Julie nous donne rendez-vous à Bordeaux après avoir arpente le pays de Blaye, visite deux fois le bassin et parcouru les terres du Libournais à deux reprises, il fallait bien s’arreter un jour dans la capitale du Bordelais ! N’y-a-t-il pas meilleure saison que le mois de septembre pour decouvrir la perle d’Aquitaine, plus souvent appelee « Cite du vin » ? Julie donne rendez-vous à ces habitants pour decouvrir les traditions mais aussi les projets plus recents de cette ville chargee d’Histoire et de gastronomie.

programme.title: Luanas Kitchen
programme.desc: Luana cuisine avec linterprète du titre phare de La Reine des Neiges : Anaïs Delva. Ensemble, elles vont preparer deux recettes 100% vegetariennes, philosophie adoptee par la chanteuse. Au menu : fettucini de courgettes grillees, haricots blancs au pesto et burger vegetarien. Comme quoi, il est possible de se regaler avec des plats vegetariens sans rester sur sa faim !

programme.title: Luanas Kitchen
programme.desc: Dans cet episode, Luana Belmondo cuisine un poisson de la Mediterranee, le rouget. Au menu : filets de rouget avec de la puree davocat et des carottes au cumin, et mille-feuille de rouget avec des legumes printaniers.

programme.title: Earth from Above
programme.desc: Pour mieux comprendre le rôle de ces montagnes explosives disseminees un peu partout sur la terre ou sous les oceans, Yann Arthus-Bertrand sest rendu en Italie, pays qui compte le plus grand nombre de volcans en activite dEurope. Accompagne du volcanologue Jacques-Marie Bardintzeff, le photographe est alle à la rencontre de ceux qui ont choisi de vivre avec « leur » volcan, malgre les dangers que cette cohabitation comporte.

programme.title: Home training
programme.desc: This episode of Home Training features an intense cardio workout. Guillaume and Sabrina guide you through a series of exercises, including high knees, lunges, and lateral movements. The focus is on endurance and energy burn, with dynamic moves engaging the entire body. As always, they emphasize the importance of warming up and staying hydrated for a safe session. Get ready to sweat and boost your cardio in a fun and motivating atmosphere!

programme.title: Yoga
programme.desc: Practice Yoga from the comfort of your home with our experienced teatchers.

programme.title: Namaste Yoga
programme.sub-title: Reconnect and Refine: Hip Opening and Abdominal Strengthening
programme.desc: Connect with the essence of your being with Reconnect and Refine. This exhilarating sequence encourages you to find comfort in the present moment, and let go of preconceived expectations or agendas. It is not about where you are going, but where you are.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Auxerre is cut by valleys whose best exposed slopes are home to vineyards. The meandering course of the Yonne runs vertically through this region. To the east of Auxerre, the Chablis region is rounded with hills. The vineyard, extending on both sides of the valley of the Serein. To the south, lined by the Nivernais canal, the upper Yonne valley attracts climbing enthusiasts and boaters, before being swollen by the waters of the Cure. The region is renowned throughout the world for the quality of its wines, particularly those of Chablis. Julie begins her journey in Auxerre and then proposes typical recipes from the area: croquignoles and cherry clafoutis.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Cest à Giverny que demarre le voyage de Julie, celui dont le nom resonne immediatement comme le berceau de l’Impressionnisme a garde une authenticite emouvante, Giverny impose son style, murmure son histoire. Sa notoriete est fortement liee à la presence historique de Claude Monet et à tous les fabuleux temoins laisses par ce dernier. Claude Monet a aussi laisse son empreinte dans la cuisine à Giverny. Ses carnets de recettes sont là pour en temoigner. C’est dans ces carnets que Julie va s’inspirer pour remplir le sien, au menu : Lapin en compote, feuillete d’andouilles au camembert, et charlottes aux abricots.

programme.title: Luanas Kitchen
programme.desc: Dans cet episode, Luana Belmondo reçoit Delphine Malachard, qui est intolerante au gluten. Ensemble, elles vont donc cuisiner des recettes sans gluten. Au menu : souffle au chocolat et financiers à la vanille et aux fruits rouges.

programme.title: Luanas Kitchen
programme.desc: Luana Belmondo cuisine la reine des proteines vegetales : la lentille. Bonne pour la sante, digeste et delicieuse, elle remplace la viande et le poisson. Nous allons preparer des galettes de lentilles corail aux epices, avec une sauce au yaourt et à la menthe. Et pour la suite, un classique de la cuisine française : une salade de lentilles vertes avec de la saucisse de Morteau.

programme.title: Luanas Kitchen
programme.desc: Dans cet episode, Luana Belmondo cuisine des pois chiches. Comme ils sont originaires du Moyen-Orient, elle decide de preparer des recettes libanaises. Au menu : fallafels avec des pois chiches, du kumquat, des epices, de la cannelle, et blettes aux pois chiches, persil, menthe et boulgour.

programme.title: Luanas Kitchen
programme.desc: Dans cet episode, Luana Belmondo met la Normandie à lhonneur ! Avec le president de la region, Herve Morin, elle prepare des pommes pochees dans un sirop de cannelle, ainsi que des moules... à sa façon.

programme.title: Luanas Kitchen
programme.desc: Avec son amie Myriam, Luana Belmondo prepare deux recettes à base de safran. Au programme : orecchiette (petites pâtes italiennes) avec de la saucisse, et lotte au citron confit avec sa puree d’asperges.

programme.title: Luanas Kitchen
programme.desc: Dans cet episode, Luana accueille Heloïse Brion, creatrice de "Miss Maggies Kitchen

programme.title: Luanas Kitchen
programme.desc: Luana Belmondo offers a recipe for celeriac risotto with citrus powder. She will also prepare black rice with spring vegetables. A real treat for the taste buds!

Guillaume and Sabrina start with a full warm-up, emphasizing the importance of preparing the body before exercise. The session is divided into two blocks: the first targeting thighs and glutes, while the second focuses on abs with intensity variations. Viewers are encouraged to complete both blocks for a balanced workout. With expert guidance and modifications, everyone can adapt the session to their level while taking on the challenge!

programme.desc: Decouvrez votre corps physique d’une manière nouvelle et differente en utilisant des repères d’alignement pour ressentir plus profondement votre espace corporel. Profitez du voyage offert par la sequence "Éveillez

programme.title: Deco Masters
programme.desc: Today, Gladys, a 60-year-old self-taught artist, is entering the race. And this native of Liège is determined to make her mark with her guilty pleasure: recycling. Yes, because if this singing teacher has a trademark, its her imagination. And in her confident bohemian style, she puts a lot of madness. The important thing is to respect the theme of “numbers and letters” and to please Alain, the owner of the room to be redecorated. This sales representative values his 200-year-old house like the apple of his eye. And he knows what he wants, especially when it comes to interior design. But our decorator is ready to rise to any challenge.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Si l’ete est la saison où les legumes abondent au potager, il serait dommage de ne pas savourer ceux que les saisons plus fraîches nous offrent : potages, tourtes, potees ou gratins mettent à l’honneur des legumes de saisons, ideals pour se rechauffer. Pour debuter ce nouveau voyage, un legume qui trônait dejà sur les tables de la Grèce Antique : le salsifis que Julie cuisinera avec une drôle de tourtière…L’hiver c’est aussi la saison du chou alors direction la Champagne pour y apprendre la recette de la potee locale qui devrait remplir le ventre d’un grand nombre de convives.Ce petit tour de France nous emmènera aussi à la decouverte d’orfèvres du maraîchage qui sculptent legumes et fruits d’hiver, et vous presentera differentes techniques et methodes pour sublimer vos potagers.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: It is a mushroom that we are going to focus on today. A mushroom, or a black diamond, some would say: the truffle.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Today, were off to discover summer fruits, which are harvested from June to August: peaches, melons, strawberries, raspberries... Well then head to the cherry capital, Ceret, and cook blueberries, strawberries and an apricot charlotte.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Auxerre is cut by valleys whose best exposed slopes are home to vineyards. The meandering course of the Yonne runs vertically through this region. To the east of Auxerre, the Chablis region is rounded with hills. The vineyard, extending on both sides of the valley of the Serein. To the south, lined by the Nivernais canal, the upper Yonne valley attracts climbing enthusiasts and boaters, before being swollen by the waters of the Cure. The region is renowned throughout the world for the quality of its wines, particularly those of Chablis. Julie begins her journey in Auxerre and then proposes typical recipes from the area: croquignoles and cherry clafoutis.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Aujourdhui cest sur la route des champignons que Julie nous embarque. Rien de mieux pour occuper ses week-ends qu’une balade en foret à la recherche de champignons comestibles. Certaines espèces, comme le cèpe ou la girolle, se conservent très bien au congelateur ou, pour les plus patients, en bocaux. Nous aurons egalement loccasion de rencontrer deux Chefs passionnes par les champignons, devenus des specialistes du sujet : Franck Quinton et Regis Marcon. Mais pour l’instant on prend la route, à la decouverte de plats typiquement français avec d’etonnants champignons de Paris en Touraine, des morilles dans le Jura, des cèpes en Gironde, des russules charbonnières en Normandie et des coulemelles en Auvergne !

programme.title: Luanas Kitchen
programme.desc: Dans cet episode, Luana Belmondo reçoit Delphine Malachard, qui est intolerante au gluten. Ensemble, elles vont donc cuisiner des recettes sans gluten. Au menu : souffle au chocolat et financiers à la vanille et aux fruits rouges.

programme.title: Luanas Kitchen
programme.desc: Luana Belmondo cuisine la reine des proteines vegetales : la lentille. Bonne pour la sante, digeste et delicieuse, elle remplace la viande et le poisson. Nous allons preparer des galettes de lentilles corail aux epices, avec une sauce au yaourt et à la menthe. Et pour la suite, un classique de la cuisine française : une salade de lentilles vertes avec de la saucisse de Morteau.

programme.title: Earth from Above
programme.desc: En Floride, on restaure à grands frais les marais des Everglades. 15 milliards de dollars sont investis sur trente ans afin de sauver l’approvisionnement en eau de toute la region. En Californie sur les cretes des collines de Tehachapi, on decouvre le plus grand site eolien du monde. En Chine, la fermentation des excrements produit du gaz, essentiellement du methane, qui, en brûlant, se transforme en energie appelee biogaz. En Californie, on decouvre le champ petrolier de Taft, l’un des plus vastes du monde : près de 10 000 puits sur plus de 52 000 hectares. Puis, Haïti se bat pour se sauver de la deforestation. Dans l’Utah, Salt Lake City traduit bien notre façon de vivre aujourd’hui : dans le monde, 37 villes comptent plus de 8 millions d’habitants. Dans l’Eure-et-Loir en France ils ont decide de construire la maison ideale permettant de donner un pavillon qui economise 85 % d’energie.
